title: Skill Definitions
description: Defines the skills that pawns can learn and improve. Each skill has an XP curve controlled by xp_base and xp_growth: XP for level N = xp_base * xp_growth^(N-1).

id.description: Unique identifier for this skill. Referenced by traits, origins, and careers.

name.description: Display name shown in the crew roster and skill tooltips.

description.description: Flavor text explaining what this skill represents and how it affects gameplay.

xp_base.description: XP required to reach level 1. Higher levels multiply this by xp_growth.

xp_growth.description: Multiplier applied per level for the XP curve. Must be greater than 1.0 or XP requirements stay flat across levels.
